001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static javax.xml.stream.XMLStreamConstants.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.XmlFormat.*;
024
025import java.io.*;
026import java.lang.reflect.*;
027import java.util.*;
028
029import javax.xml.stream.*;
030import javax.xml.stream.util.*;
031
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
039
040/**
041 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link XmlParser}.
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlSupport">XML Basics</a>
049
050 * </ul>
051 */
052@SuppressWarnings({
053   "java:S110",  // Deep inheritance inherent to the serializer/parser session hierarchy
054   "java:S115",  // PROP_xxx constants use camelCase after prefix intentionally (property keys, not enum-style constants)
055   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
056   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
057   "resource" // RecordReader returned by RecordAdapter is a Closeable owned by the caller; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
058})
059public class XmlParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
060
061   // Property name constants
062   private static final String PROP_preserveRootElement = "preserveRootElement";
063   private static final String PROP_validating = "validating";
064   private static final String PROP_XmlParserSession_preserveRootElement = "XmlParserSession.preserveRootElement";
065   private static final String PROP_XmlParserSession_validating = "XmlParserSession.validating";
066
067   /**
068    * Builder class.
069    */
070   @SuppressWarnings({
071      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
072   })
073   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF> {
074
075      private boolean preserveRootElement;
076      private boolean validating;
077      private XmlParser ctx;
078
079      /**
080       * Constructor
081       *
082       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
083       */
084      protected Builder(XmlParser ctx) {
085         super(ctx);
086         this.ctx = ctx;
087         preserveRootElement = ctx.isPreserveRootElement();
088         validating = ctx.isValidating();
089      }
090
091      @Override
092      public XmlParserSession build() {
093         return new XmlParserSession(this);
094      }
095
096      /**
097       * Preserve root element during XML parsing.
098       *
099       * @param value The new value for this setting.
100       * @return This object.
101       */
102      public SELF preserveRootElement(boolean value) {
103         preserveRootElement = value;
104         return self();
105      }
106
107      /**
108       * Validate XML during parsing.
109       *
110       * @param value The new value for this setting.
111       * @return This object.
112       */
113      public SELF validating(boolean value) {
114         validating = value;
115         return self();
116      }
117
118      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
119      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
120         if (key == null) { super.property(key, value); return self(); }
121         switch (key) {
122            case PROP_preserveRootElement, PROP_XmlParserSession_preserveRootElement:
123               return preserveRootElement(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
124            case PROP_validating, PROP_XmlParserSession_validating:
125               return validating(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
126            default:
127               super.property(key, value);
128               return self();
129         }
130      }
131
132   }
133
134   /**
135    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
136    */
137   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
138
139      DefaultBuilder(XmlParser ctx) {
140         super(ctx);
141      }
142   }
143
144   private static final int UNKNOWN = 0;
145   private static final int OBJECT = 1;
146   private static final int ARRAY = 2;
147   private static final int STRING = 3;
148   private static final int NUMBER = 4;
149   private static final int BOOLEAN = 5;
150   private static final int NULL = 6;
151
152   /**
153    * Creates a new builder for this object.
154    *
155    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
156    * @return A new builder.
157    */
158   @SuppressWarnings({
159      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
160   })
161   public static Builder<?> create(XmlParser ctx) {
162      return new DefaultBuilder(ctx);
163   }
164
165   private static int getJsonType(String s) {
166      if (s == null)
167         return UNKNOWN;
168      var c = s.charAt(0);
169      return switch (c) {
170         case 'o' -> (s.equals("object") ? OBJECT : UNKNOWN);
171         case 'a' -> (s.equals("array") ? ARRAY : UNKNOWN);
172         case 's' -> (s.equals("string") ? STRING : UNKNOWN);
173         case 'b' -> (s.equals("boolean") ? BOOLEAN : UNKNOWN);
174         case 'n' -> {
175            c = s.charAt(2);
176            yield switch (c) {
177               case 'm' -> (s.equals("number") ? NUMBER : UNKNOWN);
178               case 'l' -> (s.equals("null") ? NULL : UNKNOWN);
179               default -> NUMBER;
180            };
181         }
182         default -> UNKNOWN;
183      };
184   }
185
186   private final XmlParser ctx;
187   private final boolean preserveRootElement;
188   private final boolean validating;
189
190   private final StringBuilder rsb = new StringBuilder();  // Reusable string builder used in this class.
191
192   /**
193    * Constructor.
194    *
195    * @param builder The builder for this object.
196    */
197   protected XmlParserSession(Builder<?> builder) {
198      super(builder);
199      ctx = builder.ctx;
200      preserveRootElement = builder.preserveRootElement;
201      validating = builder.validating;
202   }
203
204   /*
205    * Returns the name of the specified attribute on the current XML element.
206    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
207    */
208   private String getAttributeName(XmlReader r, int i) {
209      return decodeString(r.getAttributeLocalName(i));
210   }
211
212   /*
213    * Returns the value of the specified attribute on the current XML element.
214    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
215    */
216   private String getAttributeValue(XmlReader r, int i) {
217      return decodeString(r.getAttributeValue(i));
218   }
219
220   /*
221    * Takes the element being read from the XML stream reader and reconstructs it as XML.
222    * Used when reconstructing bean properties of type {@link XmlFormat#XMLTEXT}.
223    */
224   private String getElementAsString(XmlReader r) {
225      int t = r.getEventType();
226      if (t > 2)
227         throw rex("Invalid event type on stream reader for elementToString() method: ''{0}''", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
228      rsb.setLength(0);
229      rsb.append("<").append(t == 1 ? "" : "/").append(r.getLocalName());
230      if (t == 1)
231         for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++)
232            rsb.append(' ').append(r.getAttributeName(i)).append('=').append('\'').append(r.getAttributeValue(i)).append('\'');
233      rsb.append('>');
234      return rsb.toString();
235   }
236
237   /*
238    * Returns the name of the current XML element.
239    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
240    */
241   private String getElementName(XmlReader r) {
242      return decodeString(r.getLocalName());
243   }
244
245   /*
246    * Returns the _name attribute value.
247    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
248    */
249   private String getNameProperty(XmlReader r) {
250      return decodeString(r.getAttributeValue(null, MarshallingSession.NAME_PROPERTY_NAME));
251   }
252
253   /*
254    * Shortcut for calling <code>getText(r, <jk>true</jk>);</code>.
255    */
256   private String getText(XmlReader r) {
257      return getText(r, true);
258   }
259
260   /*
261    * Returns the content of the current CHARACTERS node.
262    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
263    * Leading and trailing whitespace (unencoded) will be trimmed from the result.
264    */
265   private String getText(XmlReader r, boolean trim) {
266      var s = r.getText();
267      if (trim)
268         s = s.trim();
269      if (s.isEmpty())
270         return null;
271      return decodeString(s);
272   }
273
274   @SuppressWarnings({
275      "null",        // Null handling verified by context or framework
276      "java:S3776",  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
277      "java:S6541",  // Brain Method — complex XML parsing logic; structural refactoring would reduce readability without meaningful benefit.
278   })
279   private Object getUnknown(XmlReader r) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
280      if (r.getEventType() != START_ELEMENT) {
281         throw new ParseException(this, "Parser must be on START_ELEMENT to read next text.");
282      }
283      MarshalledMap m = null;
284
285      // If this element has attributes, then it's always a MarshalledMap.
286      if (r.getAttributeCount() > 0) {
287         m = newGenericMap();
288         for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++) {
289            var key = getAttributeName(r, i);
290            var val = r.getAttributeValue(i);
291            if (! isSpecialAttr(key))
292               m.put(key, val);
293         }
294      }
295      int eventType = r.next();
296      var sb = getStringBuilder();
297      while (eventType != END_ELEMENT) {
298         if (eventType == CHARACTERS || eventType == CDATA || eventType == XMLStreamConstants.SPACE || eventType == ENTITY_REFERENCE) {
299            sb.append(r.getText());
300         } else if (eventType == PROCESSING_INSTRUCTION || eventType == COMMENT) {
301            // skipping
302         } else if (eventType == END_DOCUMENT) {
303            throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected end of document when reading element text content");
304         } else if (eventType == START_ELEMENT) {
305            // Oops...this has an element in it.
306            // Parse it as a map.
307            if (m == null)
308               m = newGenericMap();
309            int depth = 0;
310            do {
311               int event = (eventType == -1 ? r.nextTag() : eventType);
312               String currAttr;
313               if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
314                  depth++;
315                  currAttr = getNameProperty(r);
316                  if (currAttr == null)
317                     currAttr = getElementName(r);
318                  String key = convertAttrToType(null, currAttr, string());
319                  var value = parseAnything(object(), currAttr, r, null, false, null);
320                  if (m.containsKey(key)) {
321                     var o = m.get(key);
322                     if (o instanceof MarshalledList o2)
323                        o2.add(value);
324                     else
325                        m.put(key, new JsonList(o, value).setBeanSession(this));
326                  } else {
327                     m.put(key, value);
328                  }
329
330               } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
331                  break;
332               }
333               eventType = -1;
334            } while (depth > 0);
335            break;
336         } else {
337            throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected event type ''{0}''", eventType);
338         }
339         eventType = r.next();
340      }
341      var s = sb.toString().trim();
342      returnStringBuilder(sb);
343      s = decodeString(s);
344      if (nn(m)) {
345         if (! s.isEmpty())
346            m.put("contents", s);
347         return m;
348      }
349      return s;
350   }
351
352   private boolean isSpecialAttr(String key) {
353      return key.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(null)) || key.equals(MarshallingSession.NAME_PROPERTY_NAME);
354   }
355
356   @SuppressWarnings({
357      "null", // Null handling verified by context or framework
358      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
359      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
360   })
361   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBean(XmlReader r, BeanMap<T> m, boolean isNil) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
362      var bMeta = m.getMeta();
363      var xmlMeta = getXmlBeanMeta(bMeta);
364
365      for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++) {
366         String key = getAttributeName(r, i);
367         if (! ("nil".equals(key) || isSpecialAttr(key))) {
368            var val = r.getAttributeValue(i);
369            var ns = r.getAttributeNamespace(i);
370            var bpm = xmlMeta.getPropertyMeta(key);
371            if (bpm == null) {
372               if (nn(xmlMeta.getAttrsProperty())) {
373                  xmlMeta.getAttrsProperty().add(m, key, key, val);
374               } else if (ns == null) {
375                  onUnknownProperty(key, m, val);
376               }
377            } else {
378               try {
379                  bpm.set(m, key, val);
380               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
381                  onBeanSetterException(bpm, e);
382                  throw e;
383               }
384            }
385         }
386      }
387
388      var cp = xmlMeta.getContentProperty();
389      var cpf = xmlMeta.getContentFormat();
390      var trim = cp == null || ! cpf.isOneOf(MIXED_PWS, TEXT_PWS);
391      ClassMeta<?> cpcm = (cp == null ? object() : (ClassMeta<?>) cp.getBeanInfo());
392      StringBuilder sb = null;
393      var breg = cp == null ? null : cp.getBeanRegistry();
394      List<Object> l = null;
395
396      int depth = 0;
397      do {
398         var event = r.next();
399         String currAttr;
400         // We only care about text in MIXED mode.
401         // Ignore if in ELEMENTS mode.
402         if (event == CHARACTERS) {
403            if (nn(cp) && cpf.isOneOf(MIXED, MIXED_PWS)) {
404               if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
405                  if (l == null)
406                     l = new LinkedList<>();
407                  l.add(getText(r, false));
408               } else {
409                  cp.set(m, null, getText(r, trim));
410               }
411            } else if (cpf != ELEMENTS) {
412               var s = getText(r, trim);
413               if (nn(s)) {
414                  if (sb == null)
415                     sb = getStringBuilder();
416                  sb.append(s);
417               }
418            } else {
419               // Do nothing...we're in ELEMENTS mode.
420            }
421         } else if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
422            if (nn(cp) && cpf.isOneOf(TEXT, TEXT_PWS)) {
423               var s = parseText(r);
424               if (nn(s)) {
425                  if (sb == null)
426                     sb = getStringBuilder();
427                  sb.append(s);
428               }
429               depth--;
430            } else if (cpf == XMLTEXT) {
431               if (sb == null)
432                  sb = getStringBuilder();
433               sb.append(getElementAsString(r));
434               depth++;
435            } else if (nn(cp) && cpf.isOneOf(MIXED, MIXED_PWS)) {
436               if (isWhitespaceElement(r) && (breg == null || ! breg.hasName(r.getLocalName()))) {
437                  if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
438                     if (l == null)
439                        l = new LinkedList<>();
440                     l.add(parseWhitespaceElement(r));
441                  } else {
442                     cp.set(m, null, parseWhitespaceElement(r));
443                  }
444               } else {
445                  if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
446                     if (l == null)
447                        l = new LinkedList<>();
448                     l.add(parseAnything(cpcm.getElementType(), cp.getName(), r, m.getBean(false), false, cp));
449                  } else {
450                     cp.set(m, null, parseAnything(cpcm, cp.getName(), r, m.getBean(false), false, cp));
451                  }
452               }
453            } else if (nn(cp) && cpf == ELEMENTS) {
454               cp.add(m, null, parseAnything(cpcm.getElementType(), cp.getName(), r, m.getBean(false), false, cp));
455            } else {
456               currAttr = getNameProperty(r);
457               if (currAttr == null)
458                  currAttr = getElementName(r);
459               var pMeta = xmlMeta.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
460               if (pMeta == null) {
461                  var value = parseAnything(object(), currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, null);
462                  onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, value);
463               } else {
464                  setCurrentProperty(pMeta);
465                  var xf = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getXmlFormat();
466                  if (xf == COLLAPSED) {
467                     var et = ((ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo()).getElementType();
468                     var value = parseAnything(et, currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, pMeta);
469                     setName(et, value, currAttr);
470                     pMeta.add(m, currAttr, value);
471                  } else if (xf == ATTR) {
472                     pMeta.set(m, currAttr, getAttributeValue(r, 0));
473                     r.nextTag();
474                  } else {
475                     var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
476                     var value = parseAnything(cm, currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, pMeta);
477                     setName(cm, value, currAttr);
478                     pMeta.set(m, currAttr, value);
479                  }
480                  setCurrentProperty(null);
481               }
482            }
483         } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
484            if (depth > 0) {
485               if (cpf == XMLTEXT) {
486                  if (sb == null)
487                     sb = getStringBuilder();
488                  sb.append(getElementAsString(r));
489               } else
490                  throw new ParseException("End element found where one was not expected.  {0}", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
491            }
492            depth--;
493         } else if (event == COMMENT) {
494            // Ignore comments.
495         } else {
496            throw new ParseException("Unexpected event type: {0}", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
497         }
498      } while (depth >= 0);
499
500      if (nn(cp) && ! isNil) {
501         if (nn(sb))
502            cp.set(m, null, sb.toString());
503         else if (nn(l))
504            cp.set(m, null, XmlUtils.collapseTextNodes(l));
505         else if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
506            var o = cp.get(m, null);
507            if (o == null)
508               cp.set(m, cp.getName(), list());
509         }
510      }
511
512      returnStringBuilder(sb);
513      return m;
514   }
515
516   private <E> Collection<E> parseIntoCollection(XmlReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
517      int depth = 0;
518      int argIndex = 0;
519      do {
520         var event = r.nextTag();
521         if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
522            depth++;
523            ClassMeta<?> elementType;
524            if (type == null) {
525               elementType = object();
526            } else if (type.isArgs()) {
527               elementType = type.getArg(argIndex++);
528            } else {
529               elementType = type.getElementType();
530            }
531            E value = (E)parseAnything(elementType, null, r, l, false, pMeta);
532            l.add(value);
533         } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
534            return l;
535         }
536      } while (depth > 0);
537      return l;
538   }
539
540   @SuppressWarnings({
541      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
542   })
543   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseIntoMap(XmlReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
544      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
545      int depth = 0;
546      for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++) {
547         var a = r.getAttributeLocalName(i);
548         if (! isSpecialAttr(a)) {
549            K key = trim(convertAttrToType(m, a, keyType));
550            V value = trim(convertAttrToType(m, r.getAttributeValue(i), valueType));
551            setName(valueType, value, key);
552            m.put(key, value);
553         }
554      }
555      do {
556         var event = r.nextTag();
557         String currAttr;
558         if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
559            depth++;
560            currAttr = getNameProperty(r);
561            if (currAttr == null)
562               currAttr = getElementName(r);
563            K key = convertAttrToType(m, currAttr, keyType);
564            V value = parseAnything(valueType, currAttr, r, m, false, pMeta);
565            setName(valueType, value, currAttr);
566            if (valueType.isObject() && m.containsKey(key)) {
567               var o = m.get(key);
568               if (o instanceof List o2)
569                  o2.add(value);
570               else
571                  m.put(key, (V)new JsonList(o, value).setBeanSession(this));
572            } else {
573               m.put(key, value);
574            }
575         } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
576            return m;
577         }
578      } while (depth > 0);
579      return m;
580   }
581
582   /**
583    * Decodes and trims the specified string.
584    *
585    * <p>
586    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
587    *
588    * @param s The string to be decoded.
589    * @return The decoded string.
590    */
591   protected final String decodeString(String s) {
592      if (s == null)
593         return null;
594      rsb.setLength(0);
595      s = XmlUtils.decode(s, rsb);
596      if (isTrimStrings())
597         s = s.trim();
598      return s;
599   }
600
601   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
602   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
603      try {
604         return parseAnything(type, null, getXmlReader(pipe), getOuter(), true, null);
605      } catch (XMLStreamException e) {
606         throw new ParseException(e);
607      }
608   }
609
610   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
611   protected <E> Collection<E> doParseIntoCollection(ParserPipe pipe, Collection<E> c, Type elementType) throws Exception {
612      var cm = getClassMeta(c.getClass(), elementType);
613      return parseIntoCollection(getXmlReader(pipe), c, cm.getElementType(), null);
614   }
615
616   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
617   protected <K,V> Map<K,V> doParseIntoMap(ParserPipe pipe, Map<K,V> m, Type keyType, Type valueType) throws Exception {
618      return parseIntoMap(getXmlReader(pipe), m, (ClassMeta<K>)getClassMeta(keyType), (ClassMeta<V>)getClassMeta(valueType), null);
619   }
620
621   /**
622    * Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over an XML document, bound to this live session.
623    *
624    * <p>
625    * Because XML's wire format (attributes, namespaces, mixed content) is non-trivial to expose
626    * as a fine-grained token cursor, this implementation supports only the cursor-level POJO
627    * bridge &mdash; {@link RecordReader#read(Class) read(...)} delegates to the polymorphic
628    * {@link ParserSession#parse(Object, Class)} entry point.
629    *
630    * @param input The input.
631    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
632    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
633    */
634   @Override /* RecordReadable */
635   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
636      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
637   }
638
639   /**
640    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} for XML, bound to this live session.  Calls
641    * {@code parse(input, List.class, Object.class)} once and iterates the result.
642    *
643    * <p>
644    * For caller-specified-root semantics use {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object, String)}.
645    *
646    * @param input The input.
647    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
648    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
649    */
650   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
651   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
652      return RecordAdapter.arrayReader(this, input);
653   }
654
655   /**
656    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} that honors the caller-specified root element
657    * name.
658    *
659    * <p>
660    * The document is parsed once into a generic structure and the records to yield are selected by
661    * the supplied {@code rootElementName}:
662    * <ul>
663    *    <li>If the document root is a <b>wrapper element</b> (parses to a {@link Map}) that contains a
664    *       child named {@code rootElementName}, that child's value supplies the records (a repeated
665    *       child element parses to a {@link List}; a single occurrence yields one record).  Sibling
666    *       elements with other names are ignored.
667    *    <li>If the document root is an <b>array wrapper</b> (parses to a {@link List}, e.g. Juneau's
668    *       {@code <array>} envelope), its already-unwrapped elements are the records and the hint is a
669    *       no-op.
670    *    <li>A scalar root yields a single record.
671    * </ul>
672    *
673    * <p>
674    * A <jk>null</jk> {@code rootElementName} is equivalent to {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
675    * The cursor is buffered ({@link RecordReader#isStreaming()} == <jk>false</jk>); see
676    * {@code 175ab} Item 3 for why true element-at-a-time XML streaming is left for a
677    * demand-driven StAX cursor.
678    *
679    * @param input The input.
680    * @param rootElementName The name of the wrapping/child element whose occurrences are the
681    *    records.  <jk>null</jk> defers to {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
682    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
683    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
684    */
685   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
686   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input, String rootElementName) throws IOException {
687      if (rootElementName == null)
688         return parseArrayRecords(input);
689      Object parsed;
690      try {
691         parsed = parse(input, Object.class);
692      } catch (ParseException e) {
693         throw new IOException(e);
694      }
695      var records = selectRootElements(parsed, rootElementName);
696      var iter = records.iterator();
697      return new RecordReader() {
698         @Override public boolean canRead() { return iter.hasNext(); }
699         @Override public <T> T read(Class<T> type) { return convertToType(nextElement(), type); }
700         @Override public <T> T read(ClassMeta<T> type) { return convertToType(nextElement(), type); }
701         @Override public <T> T read(Type type, Type... args) { return XmlParserSession.this.<T>convertToType(nextElement(), type, args); }
702         @Override public boolean isStreaming() { return false; }
703         @Override public void close() throws IOException {
704            if (input instanceof Closeable c)
705               c.close();
706         }
707         private Object nextElement() {
708            if (! iter.hasNext())
709               throw new IllegalStateException("Array stream is exhausted.");
710            return iter.next();
711         }
712      };
713   }
714
715   /** Selects the records to yield from a generically-parsed XML document, honoring the root-element hint. */
716   private static List<Object> selectRootElements(Object parsed, String rootElementName) {
717      if (parsed == null)
718         return Collections.emptyList();
719      if (parsed instanceof Map<?,?> m) {
720         var v = m.get(rootElementName);
721         if (v == null)
722            return Collections.emptyList();
723         if (v instanceof List<?> l)
724            return new ArrayList<>(l);
725         return new ArrayList<>(Collections.singletonList(v));
726      }
727      if (parsed instanceof List<?> l)
728         return new ArrayList<>(l);
729      return new ArrayList<>(Collections.singletonList(parsed));
730   }
731
732   /**
733    * The XML record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
734    *
735    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
736    */
737   @Override /* RecordReadable */
738   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
739
740   /**
741    * The XML array-record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
742    *
743    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
744    */
745   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
746   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
747
748   /**
749    * Returns the text content of the current XML element.
750    *
751    * <p>
752    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
753    *
754    * <p>
755    * Leading and trailing whitespace (unencoded) will be trimmed from the result.
756    *
757    * @param r The reader to read the element text from.
758    * @return The decoded text.  <jk>null</jk> if the text consists of the sequence <js>'_x0000_'</js>.
759    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying reader.
760    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
761    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
762    */
763   protected String getElementText(XmlReader r) throws XMLStreamException, IOException, ParseException {
764      return decodeString(r.getElementText().trim());
765   }
766
767   /**
768    * XML event allocator.
769    *
770    * @see XmlParser.Builder#eventAllocator(Class)
771    * @return
772    *    The {@link XMLEventAllocator} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
773    */
774   protected final XMLEventAllocator getEventAllocator() { return ctx.getEventAllocator(); }
775
776   /**
777    * XML reporter.
778    *
779    * @see XmlParser.Builder#reporter(Class)
780    * @return
781    *    The {@link XMLReporter} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
782    */
783   protected final XMLReporter getReporter() { return ctx.getReporter(); }
784
785   /**
786    * XML resolver.
787    *
788    * @see XmlParser.Builder#resolver(Class)
789    * @return
790    *    The {@link XMLResolver} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
791    */
792   protected final XMLResolver getResolver() { return ctx.getResolver(); }
793
794   /**
795    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean.
796    *
797    * @param bm The bean to return the metadata on.
798    * @return The metadata.
799    */
800   protected XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
801      return ctx.getXmlBeanMeta(bm);
802   }
803
804   /**
805    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
806    *
807    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
808    * @return The metadata.
809    */
810   protected XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
811      return ctx.getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
812   }
813
814   /**
815    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
816    *
817    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
818    * @return The metadata.
819    */
820   protected XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
821      return ctx.getXmlClassMeta(cm);
822   }
823
824   /**
825    * Wrap the specified reader in a STAX reader based on settings in this context.
826    *
827    * @param pipe The parser input.
828    * @return The new STAX reader.
829    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
830    * @throws XMLStreamException Unexpected XML processing error.
831    */
832   protected final XmlReader getXmlReader(ParserPipe pipe) throws IOException, XMLStreamException {
833      return new XmlReader(pipe, isValidating(), getReporter(), getResolver(), getEventAllocator());
834   }
835
836   /**
837    * Preserve root element during generalized parsing.
838    *
839    * @see XmlParser.Builder#preserveRootElement()
840    * @return
841    *    <jk>true</jk> if when parsing into a generic {@link JsonMap}, the map will contain a single entry whose key
842    *    is the root element name.
843    */
844   protected final boolean isPreserveRootElement() { return preserveRootElement; }
845
846   /**
847    * Enable validation.
848    *
849    * @see XmlParser.Builder#validating()
850    * @return
851    *    <jk>true</jk> if XML document will be validated.
852    */
853   protected final boolean isValidating() { return validating; }
854
855   /**
856    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the current element is a whitespace element.
857    *
858    * <p>
859    * For the XML parser, this always returns <jk>false</jk>.
860    * However, the HTML parser defines various whitespace elements such as <js>"br"</js> and <js>"sp"</js>.
861    *
862    * @param r The XML stream reader to read the current event from.
863    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the current element is a whitespace element.
864    */
865   protected boolean isWhitespaceElement(XmlReader r) {
866      return false;
867   }
868
869   /**
870    * Workhorse method.
871    *
872    * @param <T> The expected type of object.
873    * @param eType The expected type of object.
874    * @param currAttr The current bean property name.
875    * @param r The reader.
876    * @param outer The outer object.
877    * @param isRoot If <jk>true</jk>, then we're serializing a root element in the document.
878    * @param pMeta The bean property metadata.
879    * @return The parsed object.
880    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
881    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
882    * @throws ExecutableException Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.
883    * @throws XMLStreamException Malformed XML encountered.
884    */
885   @SuppressWarnings({
886      "null",        // Null handling verified by context or framework
887      "java:S3776",  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
888      "java:S6541",  // Brain Method — complex XML parsing logic; structural refactoring would reduce readability without meaningful benefit.
889   })
890   protected <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<T> eType, String currAttr, XmlReader r, Object outer, boolean isRoot, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
891      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
892
893      if (eType == null)
894         eType = (ClassMeta<T>)object();
895      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
896      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
897      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
898      if (nn(builder))
899         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
900      else if (nn(swap))
901         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
902      else
903         sType = eType;
904
905      if (sType.isOptional())
906         return (T)o(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), currAttr, r, outer, isRoot, pMeta));
907
908      setCurrentClass(sType);
909
910      var wrapperAttr = (isRoot && isPreserveRootElement()) ? r.getName().getLocalPart() : null;
911      var typeAttr = r.getAttributeValue(null, getBeanTypePropertyName(eType));
912      var isNil = "true".equals(r.getAttributeValue(null, "nil"));
913      var jsonType = getJsonType(typeAttr);
914      var elementName = getElementName(r);
915      if (jsonType == 0) {
916         if (elementName == null || elementName.equals(currAttr))
917            jsonType = UNKNOWN;
918         else {
919            typeAttr = elementName;
920            jsonType = getJsonType(elementName);
921         }
922      }
923
924      ClassMeta tcm = getClassMeta(typeAttr, pMeta, eType);
925      if (tcm == null && nn(elementName) && ! elementName.equals(currAttr))
926         tcm = getClassMeta(elementName, pMeta, eType);
927      if (nn(tcm))
928         sType = eType = tcm;
929
930      Object o = null;
931
932      if (jsonType == NULL) {
933         r.nextTag();   // Discard end tag
934         return null;
935      }
936
937      if (sType.isObject()) {
938         if (jsonType == OBJECT) {
939            var m = newGenericMap();
940            parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
941            if (nn(wrapperAttr))
942               m = newGenericMap().append(wrapperAttr, m);
943            o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
944         } else if (jsonType == ARRAY)
945            o = parseIntoCollection(r, newGenericList(), null, pMeta);
946         else if (jsonType == STRING) {
947            o = getElementText(r);
948            if (sType.isChar())
949               o = parseCharacter(o);
950         } else if (jsonType == NUMBER)
951            o = parseNumber(getElementText(r), null);
952         else if (jsonType == BOOLEAN)
953            o = Boolean.parseBoolean(getElementText(r));
954         else if (jsonType == UNKNOWN)
955            o = getUnknown(r);
956      } else if (nn(builder) || sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
957         if (getXmlClassMeta(sType).getFormat() == COLLAPSED) {
958            var fieldName = r.getLocalName();
959            var m = nn(builder) ? toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType)) : newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
960            var bpm = getXmlBeanMeta(m.getMeta()).getPropertyMeta(fieldName);
961            var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) m.getMeta().getBeanInfo();
962            Object value = parseAnything(cm, currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, null);
963            setName(cm, value, currAttr);
964            bpm.set(m, currAttr, value);
965            o = nn(builder) ? builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType) : m.getBean();
966         } else {
967            var m = nn(builder) ? toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType)) : newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
968            m = parseIntoBean(r, m, isNil);
969            o = nn(builder) ? builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType) : m.getBean();
970         }
971      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
972         var m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
973         o = parseIntoMap(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
974         if (nn(wrapperAttr)) {
975            var wrapper = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap());
976            wrapper.put(wrapperAttr, m);
977            o = wrapper;
978         }
979      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
980         var l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericList());
981         o = parseIntoCollection(r, l, sType, pMeta);
982      } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
983         var l = (ArrayList)parseIntoCollection(r, list(), sType, pMeta);
984         o = toArray(sType, l);
985      } else if (sType.isCharSequence()) {
986         o = getElementText(r);
987      } else if (sType.isChar()) {
988         o = parseCharacter(getElementText(r));
989      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
990         o = parseNumber(getElementText(r), (Class<? extends Number>)sType.inner());
991      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
992         o = Boolean.parseBoolean(getElementText(r));
993      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
994         o = parseDate(getElementText(r), sType);
995      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
996         o = parseCalendar(getElementText(r), sType);
997      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
998         o = parseTemporal(getElementText(r), sType);
999      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
1000         o = parseDuration(getElementText(r));
1001      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
1002         o = parsePeriod(getElementText(r));
1003      } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer)) {
1004         o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, getElementText(r));
1005      } else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler())) {
1006         var m = newGenericMap();
1007         parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
1008         if (nn(wrapperAttr))
1009            m = newGenericMap().append(wrapperAttr, m);
1010         o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
1011      } else {
1012         throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}'', property: ''{2}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason(),
1013            pMeta == null ? null : pMeta.getName());
1014      }
1015
1016      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
1017         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
1018
1019      if (nn(outer))
1020         setParent(eType, o, outer);
1021
1022      return (T)o;
1023   }
1024
1025   /**
1026    * Parses the current element as text.
1027    *
1028    * @param r The input reader.
1029    * @return The parsed text.
1030    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying reader.
1031    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
1032    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
1033    */
1034   protected String parseText(XmlReader r) throws IOException, XMLStreamException, ParseException {
1035      // Note that this is different than {@link #getText(XmlReader)} since it assumes that we're pointing to a
1036      // whitespace element.
1037
1038      var sb2 = getStringBuilder();
1039
1040      int depth = 0;
1041      while (true) {
1042         var et = r.getEventType();
1043         if (et == START_ELEMENT) {
1044            sb2.append(getElementAsString(r));
1045            depth++;
1046         } else if (et == CHARACTERS) {
1047            sb2.append(getText(r));
1048         } else if (et == END_ELEMENT) {
1049            sb2.append(getElementAsString(r));
1050            depth--;
1051            if (depth <= 0)
1052               break;
1053         }
1054         r.next();
1055      }
1056      var s = sb2.toString();
1057      returnStringBuilder(sb2);
1058      return s;
1059   }
1060
1061   /**
1062    * Parses the current whitespace element.
1063    *
1064    * <p>
1065    * For the XML parser, this always returns <jk>null</jk> since there is no concept of a whitespace element.
1066    * However, the HTML parser defines various whitespace elements such as <js>"br"</js> and <js>"sp"</js>.
1067    *
1068    * @param r The XML stream reader to read the current event from.
1069    * @return The whitespace character or characters.
1070    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying reader.
1071    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
1072    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
1073    */
1074   protected String parseWhitespaceElement(XmlReader r) throws IOException, XMLStreamException, ParseException {
1075      return null;
1076   }
1077}
